obligations.description: Company shall file annual privacy impact assessment with the Office of the Privacy Commissioner by December 31, 2026
Company shall renew operating licence with the Financial Transactions and Reports Analysis Centre of Canada by March 31, 2026
Company shall submit quarterly compliance certificate to the board of directors by June 30, 2026
Company shall submit quarterly compliance certificate to the board of directors by September 30, 2026
Company shall conduct annual third-party security audit by November 30, 2026
Vendor shall deliver updated data processing agreement to Company by May 15, 2026
Vendor shall provide evidence of SOC 2 Type II certification by June 30, 2026
Vendor shall renew subprocessor registration with Company by December 1, 2026
Company shall pay annual platform licence fee of $240,000 to Bluechip Solutions Inc. by May 1, 2026
Company shall deliver audit access certificate to Bluechip Solutions Inc. by May 1, 2026
Company shall notify Bluechip Solutions Inc. of material changes to Company's data architecture by Within 30 days of change
Bluechip Solutions Inc. shall deliver updated API documentation to Company by April 30, 2026
Bluechip Solutions Inc. shall provide 99.9% uptime guarantee and submit monthly SLA reports to Company by Monthly
Company shall complete annual workplace safety training for all employees by June 30, 2026
Company shall file T4 slips and T4 summary with the Canada Revenue Agency by February 28, 2026
Company shall complete annual performance reviews for all employees by December 31, 2026
Company shall pay annual RRSP matching contributions for eligible employees by March 31, 2026
Company shall provide written notice of any layoffs to affected employees no later than 8 weeks prior to the effective date by Rolling
Company shall renew commercial general liability insurance policy by July 31, 2026
Company shall renew cyber liability insurance policy with minimum coverage of $10,000,000 by July 31, 2026
Company shall provide certificate of insurance to Bluechip Solutions Inc. by August 15, 2026
Company shall notify insurer of material change in business operations within 30 days of change by Rolling
Responsible parties must report completion to the compliance officer within 5 business days of satisfying each obligation

If the Company fails to satisfy any obligation in Schedule A by the stated due date, the compliance officer shall notify the board of directors within 2 business days and prepare a remediation plan within 10 business days
The Company shall maintain a compliance register recording the date of completion and evidence document for each satisfied obligation
